texto: And then you realize one day that you can't remember her scent and nothing smells like her anymore. You can't remember how she feels or the sound of her voice. You haven't thought of her every second of every day. Then--then you feel more alone than on the day you lost her.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Desiree Banks: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a amor. O trecho “And then you realize one day that you can't remember her scent and nothing smells like her anymor…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, historical-romance, romance pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de romance e western.

frase_original: And then you realize one day that you can't remember her scent and nothing smells like her anymore. You can't remember how she feels or the sound of her voice. You haven't thought of her every second of every day. Then--then you feel more alone than on the day you lost her.
